ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the compound as found in literature */,
  "mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the compound */,
  "method" TEXT /* Methodology used in the study of the compound */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity level of the compound against cancer */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer associated with the compound */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the compound record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the compound record */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound record was last updated */,
  "compound_type" TEXT /* Type of compound (e.g., small molecule, biologic) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the compound (e.g., protein, gene) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_cancer_type FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_mechanism FOREIGN KEY ("mechanism") REFERENCES mechanisms ("mechanism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_activity FOREIGN KEY ("activity") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanisms" (
  "mechanism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mechanism of action */,
  "mechanism_type" TEXT /* Type of mechanism (e.g., inhibition, activation) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mechanism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Level of activity exhibited by the compound */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the activity level */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity level (e.g., IC50, EC50) */,
  "value" REAL /* Numerical value of the activity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_group" TEXT /* Group of cancer types (e.g., carcinoma, sarcoma) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cancer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound related to the reference */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference citation from literature */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., journal article, book chapter) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital object identifier (DOI) for the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's focus */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* IDs of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
